questions.answer: Zeekr is based in the Cayman Islands, where its holding company, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, was incorporated in March 2021. The company also has significant operations and subsidiaries in China, including ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. and ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., which handle production and commercialization of electric vehicles. Additionally, Zeekr has a research and development center in Sweden, known as Zeekr Technology Europe AB. This information is based on knowledge available before 2024-12-31.

rag_info.chunk_content: Zeekr Technology Europe AB, or Zeekr Tech EU/ZTE, is Zeekr Technology's Sweden-based R&D center founded in 2013 that is strategically focused on the following aspects. Zeekr Technology Europe AB conducts R&D activities relating to the products that Zeekr Technology plans to roll out in overseas markets. These products include, among others, (i) next-generation mobility solutions, such as robotaxi, (ii) passenger battery electric vehicles (BEVs) satisfying local standards and customer preferences, and (iii) a series of digital offerings, such as data analytics tools and smart cockpit functions. ● Zeekr Technology Europe AB also implements the development of a variety of BEV-related technologies and capabilities, such as user-centric systems with in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities, in-vehicle centralized architecture, as well as a cloud-based data management platform for user experiences and data analytics. Zeekr Technology Europe AB also provides specific R&D services on a project basis. ● In addition, Zeekr Technology Europe AB has developed SEA-M, an advanced version of SEA featuring integration potential for autonomous driving systems and future smart mobility, to support Zeekr Technology’s next-generation BEVs. SEA-M is designed to enable mobility solutions that fulfill different use cases with superior driving experience, ultralong durability, and the capabilities for ongoing upgrades. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, can have a number of innovative features, such as wide door openings with no B-pillar, highly flexible interiors, and advanced interior climate technologies. SEA-M will further facilitate the design for future BEV models.

ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited (the “Company” or “Zeekr”) was incorporated under the laws of the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021. The Company, together with its subsidiaries (collectively, the “Group”), is principally engaged in the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles and batteries, as well as the provision of automotive-related research and development services. Prior to the establishment of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, the Group’s businesses were conducted through the following entities: (i) ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., previously known as Shanghai Maple Guorun Automobile Company Ltd. (“Zeekr Shanghai”); (ii) ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“Zeekr Hangzhou Bay”); (iii) Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”); (iv) ZEEKR Technology Europe AB (“ZTE”, previously known as China-Euro Vehicle Technology Aktiebolag or “CEVT”). In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (“Geely Auto”), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization was to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization.

Lotus Technology began as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017. Lotus Technology conducts its business primarily through the following entities: (i) ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), (ii) ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”), (iii) Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”) and (iv) Zeekr Technology Europe AB (“CEVT”). Under the leadership of the co-founders, Mr. Shufu Li, Mr. Conghui An, Mr. Donghui Li, and Mr. Shengyue Gui, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology was incorporated as an exempted company with limited liability in March 2021 under the law of the Cayman Islands to act as the holding company. ZEEKR Intelligent Technology is seeking to list separately from Geely Auto because of its different brand positioning and its operational, management, and financial independence. ZEEKR Intelligent Technology has an equity story built around its premium brand, product portfolio, and future plans that is better served by operating independently and seeking a separate listing, which the company believes will allow it to establish its own profile and attract different investors. In April 2021, ZEEKR Innovation, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology, was incorporated under the laws of the British Virgin Islands. In the same period, ZEEKR Technology, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Innovation, was incorporated under the laws of Hong Kong. In April 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology announced the launch of its first BEV model, ZEEKR 001, and started delivery from October 2021.

[Table Level]
- **Table Title:** Entities Under ZEEKR Group and Their Principal Activities
- **Table Summary:** The table lists entities within the ZEEKR Group along with their geographic locations of incorporation and primary business functions. The entities focus on various aspects of electric vehicle production, commercialization, and supporting activities, such as research and development and investment holding.
- **Context:** Prior to ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited's establishment in 2021, the listed entities conducted business operations related to electric vehicles and batteries under the common control of Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. The restructuring was necessary to form an independent battery electric vehicle business for investment opportunities and overseas listing.
- **Special Notes:** All values are qualitative descriptions, and the restructuring aligns with the Group’s strategic focus on electric vehicle commercialization.

[Row Level]
- **Row 1:** ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., previously known as Shanghai Maple Guorun Automobile Company Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), is incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and primarily operates as an investment holding company.
- **Row 2:** ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”) is incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and is responsible for managing the production and commercialization of electric vehicles.
- **Row 3:** Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”) is incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and focuses on the production and sales of electric powertrains and battery packs for electric vehicles.
- **Row 4:** Zeekr Technology Europe AB, previously known as China-Euro Vehicle Technology Aktiebolag (“CEVT”), is incorporated in Sweden and provides research and development services.

In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (‘‘Geely Auto’’), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization is to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization. As these entities being transferred are all under the common control of Geely Holding, these transfers were accounted for as a restructuring of entities under common control as follows: • In July 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited established Zhejiang ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. (“Zhejiang ZEEKR”) in the People’s Republic of China (“PRC”), a wholly-owned subsidiary. • In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), a subsidiary of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (“Geely Auto”), acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”) from Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”) for a cash consideration of RMB485.3 million. The net book value of ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay at the time of acquisition was RMB500 million.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Zeekr Tech EU 
summary: Zeekr Technology Europe AB (Zeekr Tech EU), established in 2013 in Sweden, serves as a research and development hub focused on creating innovative products for international markets. The organization specializes in next-generation mobility solutions, including robotaxis and battery electric vehicles (BEVs) tailored to local standards, alongside digital offerings like data analytics and smart cockpit functions. A significant focus is placed on advancing BEV technologies that prioritize user-centric systems, integrating in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities with centralized architecture for improved user experiences.

Central to Zeekr Tech EU's initiatives is the SEA-M platform, an evolution of the SEA architecture designed to support autonomous driving and smart mobility. This platform aims to deliver versatile mobility options, exceptional driving experiences, and long-lasting vehicles that can be continuously upgraded. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, feature innovative designs, including wide door openings and flexible interiors. By the end of 2024, the company employed 733 individuals, focusing on mobility technologies, digital solutions, and future product development.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr’s smart cockpit is powered by Zeekr OS, an exclusive distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs), seamlessly integrated with Zeekr's state-of-the-art electrical and electronic (E/E) architecture. By dynamically allocating processing power to services, functions, and applications in real-time, Zeekr OS optimizes cockpit interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control, ensuring a seamless and highly responsive user experience. Zeekr OS features a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house full-stack research and development (R&D), optimized network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, eliminating system lag and enabling continuous updates. With multi-kernel compatibility (Linux, QNX), Zeekr OS supports 360-degree surround-view monitoring, parking assistance, and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software architecture. The smart cockpit experience is further enhanced by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC-based platform, standard across all Zeekr vehicle models launched in 2024, with the Zeekr 009 Grand featuring the world’s first dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system, equipped with AI-powered tuning, delivers premium acoustic performance, while the Human-Machine Interface (HMI) 3.5 introduces 3D navigation, advanced visual effects, and an intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI-powered driving assistant, leverages machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), and computer vision to provide intelligent voice interaction, predictive assistance, and customizable AI personas. Additionally, Zeekr’s open cockpit ecosystem integrates a virtualized mobile platform, a Scenario Library, and Internet of Things (IoT) connectivity, allowing seamless integration with smart home devices, gaming, and entertainment applications such as Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Smart Cockpit 
summary: Zeekr's smart cockpit, set to launch in 2024, is powered by Zeekr OS, a specialized distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs). This system integrates advanced electronic and electrical architecture, enabling real-time processing power allocation to enhance user interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control. Key features include a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house R&D, improved network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, which together minimize system lag and support continuous updates. The multi-kernel compatibility allows for advanced functionalities like 360-degree surround-view monitoring and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software.

The smart cockpit experience is further elevated by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC platform, particularly in the Zeekr 009 Grand, which boasts a dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system delivers premium sound through AI-driven tuning, while the HMI 3.5 offers advanced 3D navigation and visual effects, enhanced by the intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI assistant, leverages machine learning and natural language processing for intelligent voice interactions and customizable AI personas. The open cockpit ecosystem promotes a virtualized mobile platform and IoT connectivity, allowing integration with smart home devices and entertainment options like Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke. Overall, Zeekr's smart cockpit, driven by Zeekr OS and AI advancements, aims to provide an immersive and connected driving experience.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr 001, Zeekr's first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), is a premium crossover shooting brake developed with proprietary research and development (R&D), deep market insights, and the Sustainable Experience Architecture (SEA) platform. Launched in April 2021 with deliveries beginning in October 2021, the Zeekr 001 was the first mass-produced BEV with over $1,000 kilometers CLTC range. In October 2023, Zeekr introduced the Zeekr 001 FR, a high-performance variant featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, 800V Qilin battery, and quad e-drive system, achieving 2.02 seconds 0-100 kilometers per hour acceleration and a 280 kilometers per hour top speed. In 2024, Zeekr launched upgraded versions of the Zeekr 001 with Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 and significant performance, safety, and intelligence upgrades.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Zeekr 001 
summary: The Zeekr 001, launched in April 2021 as the first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) on the SEA platform, is a premium crossover shooting brake known for its remarkable range of over 1,000 km on the CLTC cycle. In October 2023, the high-performance Zeekr 001 FR variant was unveiled, featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, an 800V Qilin battery, and a quad e-drive system that enables acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, with a top speed of 280 km/h. In 2024, the Zeekr 001 received upgrades, including the Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 system, enhancing its performance, safety, and intelligence.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Customers try out Zeekr products and technologies, as well as participate in a wide range of events in the Zeekr Space, which usually occupies 100 square meters to 300 square meters in commercial areas. Lotus Technology has also launched Pop-Up Zeekr Spaces in China, which have more flexible leasing terms than the usual Zeekr Space and help the company connect with an expanded customer base. Zeekr Delivery Center. Lotus Technology utilizes Zeekr Delivery Centers for product delivery, most of which are located at facilities with large areas outside urban commercial centers to allow for vehicle storage and simultaneous delivery. Zeekr House. Lotus Technology launches additional Zeekr Houses in areas where car dealer shops are located across different tiers of cities in China, which allow the company to utilize the cluster effect and provide customers with a superior one-stop experience. Leveraging the service network of its sister brands in Geely Group, Lotus Technology plans to develop its Zeekr Houses cost-effectively and rapidly with the Zeekr brand and design. Through the Zeekr APP, prospective customers can place orders by paying a nonrefundable order deposit or production deposit. Relying on Lotus Technology's strong supply chain management capabilities inherited from Geely Group, Lotus Technology enables customers to choose from a vast pool of configurations, such as vehicle color, wheel hub size and style, air suspension system option, automatic door option, sound system, intelligent air conditioning package, and seat ventilation.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Direct Sales and Service Model 
summary: The company adopts a customer-centric go-to-market strategy, spearheaded by a skilled in-house sales and marketing team of 7,134 members, with a significant majority having extensive experience in the automobile and retail sectors. This team oversees a direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network, which includes 538 offline locations—467 in China and 71 internationally—designed to provide a comprehensive, high-quality customer experience throughout the sales lifecycle. Key components of this network include the Zeekr Center, which serves as a premium showroom and community hub, and Zeekr Space, where customers can engage with products and attend events. Additionally, Zeekr Delivery Centers facilitate efficient product delivery, while Zeekr House locations are strategically positioned near car dealerships to enhance customer service through a one-stop experience. 

The Zeekr APP further streamlines the purchasing process, allowing customers to place orders with a nonrefundable deposit and customize their vehicle configurations. Following a 72-hour confirmation period, delivery specialists assist with pre-delivery arrangements and coordinate the final delivery, ensuring a seamless transition from order to ownership. This integrated approach not only enhances customer engagement but also leverages the Geely Group's supply chain to deliver value-added services efficiently.

title: CEVT 
summary: Zeekr Technology Europe AB, also known as CEVT, is a Swedish research and development center established in 2013, focusing on automotive innovation for international markets, particularly in Europe and the United States. CEVT specializes in next-generation mobility solutions, including robotaxis and passenger battery electric vehicles (BEVs) that comply with local standards. The center is also developing advanced digital tools such as data analytics, smart cockpits, and fleet operations, while emphasizing user-centric systems that integrate in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities. 

One of CEVT's key projects is the SEA-M platform, an enhanced version of its SEA platform designed to support ZEEKR's future BEVs. This platform will feature autonomous driving capabilities and smart mobility options, promising a superior driving experience with innovative designs like a B-pillar-less structure and advanced air conditioning technologies. As of December 31, 2023, CEVT employed 715 individuals, primarily focused on mobility technologies and product development.

title: 1. Principal activities and history of the Group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established on March 31, 2021, in the Cayman Islands, specializes in the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles and batteries, along with providing automotive-related research and development services through its subsidiaries. The company emerged from a reorganization initiated by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., which aimed to create an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to attract external investment and prepare for an overseas listing. This reorganization involved transferring various entities, including ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., and ZEEKR Technology Europe AB, under the common control of Geely Holding to Zeekr.

In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary in China and subsequently acquired full equity stakes in Zeekr Hangzhou Bay and Zeekr Shanghai, incurring minor losses in additional paid-in capital. Additionally, Zeekr Shanghai acquired a 51% interest in Ningbo Viridi and later, in February 2022, ZTE from Geely Holding, further solidifying its operational structure. By May 2024, ZEEKR achieved a significant milestone by successfully listing on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), marking its growth and establishment in the electric vehicle market.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 1. Principal activities and history of the group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established in the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021, is dedicated to the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and batteries, alongside providing automotive-related research and development services. The company emerged from a restructuring of operations previously managed by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., with the aim of creating a focused battery electric vehicle (BEV) business to attract investment and facilitate overseas listings.

The ZEEKR Group comprises several entities, each with specific roles in the EV ecosystem. Key entities include ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., an investment holding company; ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., which handles EV production and commercialization; Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., focused on electric powertrains and battery packs; and Zeekr Technology Europe AB in Sweden, specializing in research and development.

The restructuring process involved transferring relevant businesses to ZEEKR, which was recognized as a holding company for BEV operations previously under Geely Holding. In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary in China and acquired ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay from Geely Holding for RMB485.3 million, followed by the acquisition of ZEEKR Shanghai for RMB980.4 million in August. These transactions, treated as restructuring under common control, aimed to streamline operations and enhance ZEEKR's strategic focus on advancing electric vehicle commercialization and supporting related activities.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: As these entities being transferred are all under the common control of Geely Holding, these transfers were accounted for as a restructuring of entities under common control as follows: In July 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited established Zhejiang ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd (“Zhejiang Zeekr”) in the People’s Republic of China (“PRC”), a wholly-owned subsidiary. In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited, acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. from Geely Holding for a cash consideration of RMB485.3 million. The net book value of ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. at the time of acquisition was RMB500 million. The corresponding difference between acquisition consideration paid and the entity’s net book value of RMB14,671 was recognized in additional paid-in capital. In August 2021, the Group through Zhejiang Zeekr acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (99% from Geely Automobile Holdings Limited and 1% from Geely Holding) for a cash consideration of RMB980.4 million. The net book value of ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. was RMB970.4 million at the time of acquisition. The corresponding difference between acquisition consideration paid and the entity’s net book value of RMB10,032 loss was recognized in additional paid-in capital.

title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Within less than three years since ZEEKR’s inception, ZEEKR has launched multiple commercialized electric vehicle models, namely ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001 is a five-seater crossover shooting brake BEV model targeting the premium market and mainly addressing the customer need for practical yet stylish traveling. ZEEKR released ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in February 2024 and started vehicle delivery in March 2024. ZEEKR 009 is a luxury six-seater MPV addressing the customer need for luxury mobility. In April 2023, ZEEKR released ZEEKR X, the compact SUV model, and began to deliver ZEEKR X in June 2023. ZEEKR also started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023 and began to deliver the first upscale sedan model in January 2024. In addition to major upgrades such as the release of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), ZEEKR has also been continuously fine-tuning and improving the performance of other BEV models. For example, ZEEKR updated the interior configurations of ZEEKR 009 and improved the chassis system of ZEEKR X in 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR launched ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. ZEEKR also released ZEEKR MIX, the MPV model, in the same month.

title: 1. Principal activities and history of the group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established in the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021, is dedicated to the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and batteries, alongside providing automotive-related research and development services. The company emerged from a restructuring of operations previously managed by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., with the aim of creating a focused battery electric vehicle (BEV) business to attract investment and facilitate overseas listings.

The ZEEKR Group comprises several entities, each with specific roles in the EV ecosystem. Key entities include ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., an investment holding company; ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., which handles EV production and commercialization; Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., focused on electric powertrains and battery packs; and Zeekr Technology Europe AB in Sweden, specializing in research and development.

The restructuring process involved transferring relevant businesses to ZEEKR, which was recognized as a holding company for BEV operations previously under Geely Holding. In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary in China and acquired ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay from Geely Holding for RMB485.3 million, followed by the acquisition of ZEEKR Shanghai for RMB980.4 million in August. These transactions, treated as restructuring under common control, aimed to streamline operations and enhance ZEEKR's strategic focus on advancing electric vehicle commercialization and supporting related activities.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (‘‘Geely Auto’’), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization is to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization. As these entities being transferred are all under the common control of Geely Holding, these transfers were accounted for as a restructuring of entities under common control as follows: • In July 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited established Zhejiang ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. (“Zhejiang ZEEKR”) in the People’s Republic of China (“PRC”), a wholly-owned subsidiary. • In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Corporate History 
summary: ZEEKR originated as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017 and has since evolved into a distinct entity with a focus on premium electric vehicles. Established as ZEEKR Intelligent Technology in March 2021 in the Cayman Islands, the company was co-founded by Mr. Shufu Li and others to pursue operational and financial independence from Geely Auto, allowing it to cultivate its own brand identity and attract diverse investors. The organization operates through several subsidiaries, including ZEEKR Automobile and ZEEKR Technology, and has made significant acquisitions to enhance its capabilities, such as acquiring ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay and CEVT from Geely Holding.

ZEEKR launched its first battery electric vehicle, the ZEEKR 001, in April 2021, followed by the ZEEKR 009 in November 2022 and the ZEEKR X compact SUV in April 2023. The company continues to expand its product lineup, introducing models like the ZEEKR 001 FR in October 2023 and an upscale sedan in January 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR unveiled the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant, and the ZEEKR MIX, a multi-purpose vehicle. This strategic focus on premium offerings and innovative designs positions ZEEKR as a competitive player in the electric vehicle market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. The company's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. The current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to Lotus Technology's mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: The development of Lotus Technology's BEV models is powered by SEA, a set of open-source, electric and modularized platforms owned by Geely Holding compatible with A segment to E segment, covering sedan, SUV, MPV, hatchback, roadster, pick-up truck, and robotaxi, which have a wheelbase mainly between 1,800 mm to 3,300 mm. Lotus Technology depends on Geely Holding to allow the company to continue to utilize SEA, which is currently the most suitable platform for Lotus Technology. The widely compatible SEA enables robust R&D capabilities, execution efficiency, cost efficiency, and control consistency in the vehicle development process, giving Lotus Technology's BEVs significant competitive advantages in the market. SEA also offers the flexibility to quickly adopt and accommodate the latest and most advanced technology improvements. For example, Lotus Technology was able to equip ZEEKR 009 with CATL’s latest Qilin battery, making ZEEKR 009 the first mass-produced BEV model equipped with Qilin battery, according to Frost & Sullivan. Together with Lotus Technology's proprietary advanced battery solutions and highly efficient electric drive system, ZEEKR 009’s extended range version is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with an over 800 km CLTC range and the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024, according to Frost & Sullivan.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 1. Principal activities and history of the group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established in the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021, focuses on the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and batteries, alongside providing automotive-related research and development services through its subsidiaries. The formation of ZEEKR was part of a strategic restructuring by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. to create an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business, aimed at attracting external investment and preparing for an overseas listing. This restructuring involved transferring various entities previously managed under Geely Holding and Geely Auto into ZEEKR.

Key subsidiaries within the ZEEKR Group include ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., which serves as an investment holding company, and ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., responsible for the production and commercialization of EVs. Additionally, Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. specializes in electric powertrains and battery packs, while Zeekr Technology Europe AB, based in Sweden, focuses on research and development.

The restructuring process is highlighted by significant transactions, such as the acquisition of ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay and ZEEKR Shanghai, which involved adjustments in equity interests and additional paid-in capital. Overall, ZEEKR represents a consolidated effort to streamline and enhance the electric vehicle business under Geely's broader corporate strategy.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (‘‘Geely Auto’’), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization is to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization. As these entities being transferred are all under the common control of Geely Holding, these transfers were accounted for as a restructuring of entities under common control as follows: • In July 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited established Zhejiang ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. (“Zhejiang ZEEKR”) in the People’s Republic of China (“PRC”), a wholly-owned subsidiary. • In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), a subsidiary of Geely Auto, acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”) from Geely Holding for a cash consideration of RMB485.3 million. The net book value of ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay at the time of acquisition was RMB500 million. The corresponding difference between acquisition consideration paid and the entity’s net book value of RMB14,671 was recognized in additional paid-in capital.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology began as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017. Lotus Technology conducts its business primarily through the following entities: (i) ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), (ii) ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”), (iii) Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”) and (iv) Zeekr Technology Europe AB (“CEVT”). Under the leadership of the co-founders, Mr. Shufu Li, Mr. Conghui An, Mr. Donghui Li, and Mr. Shengyue Gui, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology was incorporated as an exempted company with limited liability in March 2021 under the law of the Cayman Islands to act as the holding company. ZEEKR Intelligent Technology is seeking to list separately from Geely Auto because of its different brand positioning and its operational, management, and financial independence. ZEEKR Intelligent Technology has an equity story built around its premium brand, product portfolio, and future plans that is better served by operating independently and seeking a separate listing, which is believed to allow the company to establish its own profile and attract different investors. In April 2021, ZEEKR Innovation, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology, was incorporated under the laws of the British Virgin Islands. In the same period, ZEEKR Technology, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Innovation, was incorporated under the laws of Hong Kong. In April 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology announced the launch of its first BEV model, ZEEKR 001, and started delivery from October 2021.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Corporate History 
summary: ZEEKR originated as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017 and has since evolved into a distinct entity with several subsidiaries, including ZEEKR Automobile in Shanghai and Ningbo, as well as ZEEKR Technology Europe. Established as ZEEKR Intelligent Technology in March 2021 in the Cayman Islands, the company was co-founded by Mr. Shufu Li and others, with a vision for independent operations and a separate listing from Geely Auto to enhance its premium brand profile. 

In April 2021, ZEEKR Innovation was formed as a wholly-owned subsidiary, followed by ZEEKR Technology in Hong Kong. The company launched its first battery electric vehicle (BEV), the ZEEKR 001, in October 2021, and has since expanded its portfolio with additional models, including the ZEEKR 009 in November 2022 and the compact SUV ZEEKR X in April 2023. Recent developments include the release of the ZEEKR 001 FR in October 2023, an upscale sedan in January 2024, and an upgraded version of the ZEEKR 001 in February 2024. The company also introduced the luxury ZEEKR 009 Grand and the multi-purpose vehicle ZEEKR MIX in April 2024, showcasing its commitment to innovation and catering to a premium market segment.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. from Geely Holding. In July 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology was incorporated in the PRC, and is currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Technology. In August 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. from Geely Auto and 1% from Geely Holding. In October 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. acquired 51% equity interest in Ningbo Viridi, which was previously wholly owned by Geely Holding. In February 2022, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. acquired 100% equity interest in CEVT from Geely Holding. ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. currently holds 100% equity interest in CEVT through Zhejiang ZEEKR. In November 2022, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. launched its second BEV model, ZEEKR 009, and started delivery in January 2023. In April 2023, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. released the ZEEKR X, its compact SUV model, and began to deliver the ZEEKR X in June 2023. In October 2023, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. released the ZEEKR 001 FR, and ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. In January 2024, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. started to deliver its first upscale sedan model targeting tech-savvy adults and families. In February 2024, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. released an upgraded model of the ZEEKR 001, or ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), and started vehicle delivery in March 2024.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Corporate History 
summary: ZEEKR originated as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017 and has since evolved into a distinct entity with several subsidiaries, including ZEEKR Automobile in Shanghai and Ningbo, as well as ZEEKR Technology Europe. Established as ZEEKR Intelligent Technology in March 2021 in the Cayman Islands, the company was co-founded by Mr. Shufu Li and others, with a vision for independent operations and a separate listing from Geely Auto to enhance its premium brand profile. 

In April 2021, ZEEKR Innovation was formed as a wholly-owned subsidiary, followed by ZEEKR Technology in Hong Kong. The company launched its first battery electric vehicle (BEV), the ZEEKR 001, in October 2021, and has since expanded its portfolio with additional models, including the ZEEKR 009 in November 2022 and the compact SUV ZEEKR X in April 2023. Recent developments include the release of the ZEEKR 001 FR in October 2023, an upscale sedan in January 2024, and an upgraded version of the ZEEKR 001 in February 2024. The company also introduced the luxury ZEEKR 009 Grand and the multi-purpose vehicle ZEEKR MIX in April 2024, showcasing its commitment to innovation and catering to a premium market segment.

title: Singapore 
summary: This prospectus is not registered with the Monetary Authority of Singapore, restricting the circulation of American Depositary Shares (ADSs) and related documents within the country. The offer and sale of ADSs are limited to specific individuals or entities, as detailed in the prospectus, in accordance with the Securities and Futures Act (SFA), Chapter 289.

Under the SFA, securities may be offered to:

1. **Institutional Investors**: Defined in Section 274, this category includes banks, insurance companies, and other financial institutions.
   
2. **Relevant Persons**: As per Section 275(1), offers can be made to sophisticated investors meeting certain criteria, with Section 275(1A) allowing for offers to additional parties under specified conditions.

3. **Other Provisions**: Securities offerings must comply with all applicable SFA provisions, ensuring investor protection and market integrity.

The summary also notes that ADSs can be acquired by relevant persons under Section 275, which governs the purchase of securities. It highlights a corporation that, while not classified as an accredited investor under Section 4A, is wholly owned by accredited individuals, allowing it to operate within specific regulatory frameworks.

Additionally, a trust structure is described where the trustee is not an accredited investor, but all beneficiaries are. This trust is established to hold investments, including securities, with a six-month transfer restriction on the rights and interests of beneficiaries following the acquisition of ADSs.

Certain conditions permit transfers or offers of securities without the usual regulatory requirements under the SFA, including transfers to institutional investors or relevant persons, transfers without consideration, those occurring by operation of law, and others specified in the SFA and related regulations. These provisions aim to facilitate certain transactions while ensuring regulatory oversight in other scenarios.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Direct Sales and Service Model 
summary: ZEEKR adopts a customer-centric, go-to-market strategy, spearheaded by a proficient in-house sales and marketing team that oversees its direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network. This network is designed to provide a superior customer experience throughout the entire engagement lifecycle, focusing on site selection, construction, and operation of sales centers, as well as comprehensive delivery and after-sales services. As of December 31, 2023, approximately 84.8% of the sales and marketing team members have significant experience in the automobile and retail industries.

The ZEEKR sales network comprises four main components: ZEEKR Centers, ZEEKR Spaces, ZEEKR Delivery Centers, and ZEEKR Houses. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR Centers, which are upscale showrooms ranging from 300 to 600 square meters, numbered 24 in China and two internationally. ZEEKR Spaces, smaller venues of 100 to 300 square meters, total 240 in China, including 42 flexible Pop-Up locations aimed at increasing customer outreach. The ZEEKR Delivery Centers, totaling 31, are strategically located outside urban areas to facilitate efficient vehicle storage and delivery. Additionally, 45 ZEEKR Houses leverage the Geely Group's service network to enhance customer experiences, situated near car dealerships across various city tiers.

ZEEKR's facilities are designed to promote community engagement and strengthen brand reputation. The ZEEKR APP enables potential customers to order vehicles with non-refundable deposits, offering various configuration options due to robust supply chain management from Geely Group. Customers have a 72-hour Configuration Confirmation Period to finalize vehicle details after placing an order, with delivery specialists assisting in pre-delivery arrangements. The remaining balance is paid upon vehicle delivery, ensuring a streamlined purchasing process.
